pkgmetadata.longdescription: Operator scripts and systemd units that build a SnapRAID + MergerFS pool on top of XFS-formatted disks attached via a USB enclosure on Gentoo with systemd. Provides idempotent bootstrap helpers (preflight, role detection, formatting, fstab generation, snapraid.conf generation, first sync, timer enablement, USB tuning), a non-interactive runner invoked from systemd timers, and a recovery menu. Test and acceptance drills are gated behind the test USE flag.

use.flag: Install the one-shot bootstrap scripts: preflight, detect, format, fstab, genconf, first-sync, enable-timers, and tune-usb.
Install snapraid-runner, snapraid-runner-interactive, and the sync/scrub systemd service and timer units.

Install the snapraid-smart-long systemd service and timer, and enable the smart-long action in snapraid-runner. Disabled by default because most USB enclosures do not implement SAT passthrough deeply enough for smartctl -t long to work.
Install the integrity drill and acceptance test scripts. Hardware-dependent; not run under FEATURES=test.
